transcript: [wobbling pitch] Can you help me real... real, real, fast?
[wobbling pitch] I needed to find somebody... that's in there.
[heavy pitch wobble] Wait, wait, hello? Hello? Wait, hello?
[heavy pitch wobble] Wait, what, what are you... what are you saying?
Bye! Well, speak English, so I can understand you!
[heavy pitch wobble] Yeah, I'd be interested in having some drinks there. How much would that cost?
Why don't you... why don't you speak proper English? What's your problem?
[heavily wobbling pitch] How much would that cost for me to do that? [scramble]
